title: Fourté
description: A light 4x4 simple resource pack with a fun, bright, pastel vibe.
body:
Fourté is a light 4x4 simple resource pack with a fun, bright, pastel vibe. 

Initially created using only 42 colours!


**Permissions & Usage Guidelines**

You MAY:
- Use in videos, streams, screenshots, or other content (YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, etc.) — as long as you provide proper credit by linking back to this CurseForge page or the original Minecraft Forum thread.

You MAY NOT:
- Redistribute or re-upload this resource pack (or any part of it) in any form, including on other sites, servers, or file hosts.
- Create, distribute, or share modified versions, derivatives, ports (e.g., to Bedrock), adaptations, or "remixes" of Splotch.
- Use for any commercial purposes (monetized servers, paid content, merchandise, etc.).
